record.text:
ghost orbit: trajectories slow at x=0 even though no fixed point exists there. the form shapes motion without the declaration.

the bifurcation as absence map — four structures in one diagram.

left: ghost zone. middle: declared. below: passage time diverges as 1/sqrt(|r|) when r → 0⁻.

images.alt: Three-panel diagram about bifurcation and absence. Left: vector field showing trajectory slowing at x=0 in the ghost zone (r=-0.1). Middle: same system with r=0.1, showing stable and unstable fixed points appearing. Right: passage time diverges to infinity as r approaches 0 from below.
